Thursday 29 January 2026 | Foreign Affairs, Defence and Trade Committee

Briefing on meetings with representative counterparts and government officials

Hearing of evidence:

List of submitters:

Delegation from Kingdom of Morocco
 Her Excellency Mrs Wassane Zailachi, Ambassador


International Treaty Examination of the Agreement to Establish the Pacific Resilience Facility 

Hearing of evidence:

List of submitters:
Council for International Development Aotearoa New Zealand 
 Todd Cleaver, Executive Director 
 Sam London, Standards and Humanitarian Manager 

Peace Movement Aotearoa 
 Edwina Hughes, Coordinator 

PILLAR NZ 
 Arian Tashakkori, Head of Operations and Donor Relations
